questions.question_text: Saudi Arabia's 50% renewable target, which 'seemed impossible a decade ago', now appears increasingly 'feasible'. What does 'feasible' mean?

options.text: Extremely expensive and very difficult to fund at any scale
Possible and able to be achieved with the available resources
Already completed and no longer requiring any further effort
Risky and likely to cause serious problems if attempted

questions.explanation_ar: feasible تعني ممكن التحقيق وقابل للتطبيق، أي أن الهدف أصبح في متناول اليد بالموارد والتكنولوجيا المتاحة.

questions.question_text: Solar farms 'utilize' advanced photovoltaic technology that works in extreme heat. What does 'utilize' mean?

options.text: To test and evaluate technology before making a decision
To make practical and effective use of something available
To design and develop entirely new technology from scratch
To study the potential of technology without using it yet

questions.explanation_ar: utilize تعني يستخدم ويوظّف بشكل عملي وفعّال، أي الاستفادة القصوى من أداة أو تقنية متاحة لتحقيق غرض محدد.

questions.question_text: Saudi Arabia is expected to 'rank among' the world's top ten solar energy producers. What does 'rank among' mean?

options.text: To lead and be number one in a global category
To be placed in a specific group or position in a classification
To be excluded and not counted in any international rankings
To evaluate and compare different groups based on performance

questions.explanation_ar: rank among تعني يُصنَّف ضمن، أي احتلال موقع محدد داخل مجموعة أو فئة معينة في نظام التصنيف.

questions.question_text: Saudi engineers managed to 'turn the tables' on traditional energy paradigms. What does 'turn the tables' mean?

options.text: To create a completely new set of rules for a situation
To reverse a situation so that a disadvantage becomes an advantage
To repeat the same approach but with greater effort and funding
To abandon all previous strategies and start fresh

questions.explanation_ar: turn the tables تعني قلب الموازين لصالحك، أي تحويل وضع كان في غير صالحك إلى فرصة وميزة تنافسية.

questions.question_text: KAUST fosters innovation where researchers 'collaborate' on developing more efficient solar cells. What does 'collaborate' mean?

options.text: To work independently and compete against other researchers
To study the failures and limitations of previous research projects
To work together with others to achieve a shared goal
To publish and share findings without working with others

questions.explanation_ar: collaborate تعني يتعاون ويشترك في العمل، أي الجهد المشترك بين عدة أطراف لتحقيق هدف مشترك.

questions.question_text: When Saudi Arabia plans to 'phase out' oil for domestic electricity, it plans to gradually eliminate its use over time.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. phase out تعني يُلغي تدريجياً، أي التخلص من شيء ما بشكل منظّم ومتدرج على مراحل زمنية محددة.

questions.question_text: When renewable energy investments are described as 'unprecedented', it means similar investments have happened many times before.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. unprecedented تعني غير مسبوق، أي أنه لم يحدث مثله من قبل، وهو نقيض القول إنه تكرّر كثيراً.

questions.question_text: Saudi Arabia plans to _____ its oil dependency for domestic electricity generation entirely by 2040.
questions.explanation_ar: phase out تعني يُلغي تدريجياً ويتوقف عن استخدام، وتُستخدم للتعبير عن خطة التخلص التدريجي من شيء ما.

questions.question_text: In a news report, which past passive sentence would be most appropriate for formal writing?

options.text: Someone opened the new solar park last Monday.
They opened the new solar park last Monday.
The new solar park was opened last Monday.
A person opened the new solar park last Monday.

questions.explanation_ar: في الكتابة الرسمية والأخبار، يُفضَّل استخدام المبني للمجهول (was opened) حين لا يكون الفاعل محدداً أو مهماً، وهو أكثر احترافية من 'someone' أو 'they'.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the past passive without a 'by' agent, when the doer is unimportant?

options.text: The solar panels were installed last year by a team of engineers.
The solar panels were installed last year.
A team of engineers installed the solar panels last year.
The solar panels were installing last year.

questions.explanation_ar: حين لا يكون الفاعل مهماً أو معروفاً، يُكتفى بصيغة المبني للمجهول دون ذكر by + الفاعل، كما في الخيار b.

questions.question_text: Which sentence chooses the ACTIVE voice over passive for the best reason?

options.text: Use active: 'Saudi engineers designed the cooling system' — the doer is important and interesting.
Use active: 'The cooling system was designed' — the result matters more than who did it.
Use active: 'The prize was won' — we don't know who won it.
Use active: 'Billions were spent' — the focus is on the amount spent.

questions.explanation_ar: نختار المبني للمعلوم حين يكون الفاعل مهماً وجديراً بالذكر، كمهندسين سعوديين صمّموا نظاماً فريداً، لأن هوية المنفّذ تُضيف قيمة للمعنى.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the past passive to describe a process correctly?

options.text: First, the site was chosen, and then the panels were ordered and delivered.
First, the site chose, and then the panels ordered and delivered.
First, was chosen the site, and then ordered and delivered the panels.
First, the site was choosing, and then the panels were ordering.

questions.explanation_ar: عند وصف سلسلة خطوات بالمبني للمجهول، يُستخدم was/were + تصريف ثالث لكل خطوة. الخيار a يُطبّق ذلك بشكل متسق وصحيح.

questions.question_text: 'The Saudi renewable energy program was launched in 2016 and was praised by international energy experts' uses the past passive correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. was launched وwas praised كلاهما صيغتا مبني للمجهول صحيحتان في الماضي (was + تصريف ثالث).

questions.question_text: Match each sentence to the most appropriate reason for choosing the past passive or active voice.

left_items: The solar park was opened in 2023.
Dr. Al-Mahmoud designed the innovative cooling system.
Several factories were built near the energy facilities.
The government was awarded a prize for its clean energy record.
right_items: active: the specific person's expertise makes the doer important
passive: the achievement matters more than who received it
passive: a general event where the doer is unspecified
passive: recording a fact without specifying who built them

correct_answer.left: The solar park was opened in 2023.
correct_answer.right: passive: a general event where the doer is unspecified

correct_answer.left: Dr. Al-Mahmoud designed the innovative cooling system.
correct_answer.right: active: the specific person's expertise makes the doer important

correct_answer.left: Several factories were built near the energy facilities.
correct_answer.right: passive: recording a fact without specifying who built them

correct_answer.left: The government was awarded a prize for its clean energy record.
correct_answer.right: passive: the achievement matters more than who received it

questions.explanation_ar: الاختيار بين المبني للمعلوم والمجهول يعتمد على أهمية الفاعل للمعنى: إن كانت هوية المنفّذ تُضيف قيمة نستخدم المعلوم، وإلا نُفضّل المجهول.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, what field do students and researchers at KAUST focus on?

options.text: Oil extraction technologies and petroleum engineering methods
Developing more efficient solar cells and energy storage solutions
Building design and earthquake-resistant construction methods
Water management and desalination technology research

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن جامعة الملك عبدالله للعلوم والتقنية (كاوست) أسّست مختبرات متطورة يتعاون فيها الطلاب والباحثون على تطوير خلايا شمسية أكثر كفاءة وحلول لتخزين الطاقة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, how many jobs is Saudi Arabia's renewable sector projected to create by 2030?

options.text: 1 million jobs

questions.explanation_ar: قدّر الخبراء الصناعيون وفق ما ذكره النص أن قطاع الطاقة المتجددة في المملكة سيخلق أكثر من 750,000 فرصة عمل بحلول عام 2030.

questions.question_text: Passage B says 'international delegations regularly visit Saudi installations to study the innovative approaches.' What does this suggest?

options.text: Saudi Arabia is struggling and needs help from other countries
Saudi Arabia has become a global reference point for desert solar technology
Other countries are trying to compete with Saudi Arabia in the sector
International experts believe Saudi Arabia's methods are too risky

questions.explanation_ar: تُضمّن هذه الزيارات الدولية المنتظمة أن المملكة أصبحت نموذجاً مرجعياً عالمياً في تقنيات الطاقة الشمسية الصحراوية يحرص الآخرون على التعلم منه.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, women comprise approximately 35% of renewable energy engineering graduates in Saudi Arabia.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. ذكر النص أن النساء يُشكّلن حوالي 35% من خريجي هندسة الطاقة المتجددة، مما يعكس التزام المملكة بالتنوع الجنساني في مجالات العلوم والتكنولوجيا.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, NEOM will produce enough clean energy to power _____ million homes in Saudi Arabia.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن مشروع نيوم سينتج طاقة نظيفة كافية لتشغيل 1.5 مليون منزل مع خلق آلاف فرص العمل.

questions.question_text: Match each number or figure from the passages to what it represents.

right_items: year by which Saudi Arabia plans to eliminate oil use for domestic electricity
percentage of electricity from renewables targeted under Vision 2030
annual sunshine hours documented in certain Saudi regions
percentage of renewable engineering graduates who are women

correct_answer.right: percentage of electricity from renewables targeted under Vision 2030
annual sunshine hours documented in certain Saudi regions
percentage of renewable engineering graduates who are women
year by which Saudi Arabia plans to eliminate oil use for domestic electricity

questions.explanation_ar: وردت هذه الأرقام في النصين: 50% (هدف رؤية 2030)، 2500 ساعة (ساعات الشمس)، 35% (نسبة الخريجات)، و2040 (عام التخلص من النفط في الكهرباء).
